payload.answer: Potential conflict detected: Sam is stated to work at Goldman and to have joined Point72. Treat both as ambiguous until clarified; do not present either as the definitive current employer.
citations: Concurrent writes: Sam works at Goldman. Sam joined Point72.

entity_resolution.reason: The two concurrent statements may refer to the same Sam and potentially conflicting current employment, but there is not enough information to determine whether Sam left Goldman, has multiple roles, or whether one statement is outdated.

details: Classified as a concurrent conflict involving possible current employment.
No durable current-employer fact was committed as definitive.

repair_options: Clarify whether Sam currently works at Goldman, Point72, both, or neither.
If Sam moved from Goldman to Point72, mark Goldman as former employer and Point72 as current employer.
If Sam has concurrent roles, record both with dates or role details.
If the two statements refer to different people named Sam, create or link separate person entities.
